validated_commands.build_note: Full workspace build requires goose git dep (network blocked in CI); persistence crate builds/tests independently

open_prs.title: [Perf Improver] Atomic append_message: single WAL commit per message write
open_prs.note: PR number pending - submitted via safeoutputs

merged_prs.title: [Perf Improver] SQLite PRAGMA tuning: ~12x write throughput improvement in WAL mode

optimization_backlog.title: Atomic append_message: single WAL commit per message write
optimization_backlog.notes: Wraps upsert_session + insert_message in conn.transaction(). 2 WAL commits -> 1. In-memory benchmarks show neutral (expected). File-based WAL write amplification halved.

optimization_backlog.title: Cache recent session history in memory
optimization_backlog.notes: load_history() hits SQLite on every Goose agent invocation. An LRU cache per session would avoid repeated reads.

optimization_backlog.title: Add mmap_size PRAGMA for memory-mapped read I/O
optimization_backlog.notes: PRAGMA mmap_size = 134217728 (128MB) enables mmap reads. Simple one-line addition to setup_pragmas() in db.rs. Reduces syscall overhead for repeated reads.

perf_notes: Full workspace build downloads goose from GitHub (network blocked). Use -p opengoose-persistence for local work.
SQLite synchronous=NORMAL in WAL mode is safe and ~12x faster for per-commit writes. PR #39 merged.
libsqlite3-sys with bundled feature - SQLite version is bundled, no system SQLite dependency.
Criterion benchmarks baselines (in-memory WAL): append_message ~15µs, get_active_team ~1µs, load_history(10) ~6µs, load_history(50) ~28µs.
In-memory SQLite doesn't show WAL commit overhead - file-based benchmarks needed to demonstrate write batching benefit.
conn.transaction() requires PersistenceError: From<diesel::result::Error> which is already implemented.
